name: CMP_MKT_COMPOSITE_CONFIG_VL
query: SELECT B.COMPOSITE_CONFIG_ID, B.COMP_TYPE_CONFIG_ID, B.COMPOSITE_COLUMN_KEY, TL.DISPLAY_NAME, B.DISPLAY_SEQUENCE, B.ENABLE_FLAG, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN FROM CMP_MKT_COMPOSITE_CONFIG_B B, CMP_MKT_COMPOSITE_CONFIG_TL TL WHERE B.COMPOSITE_CONFIG_ID = TL.COMPOSITE_CONFIG_ID AND TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
